regions.text: Human history is a tiny but vital part of time. We cannot be certain how old the universe is, but it seems to be about five billion years old.
The universe has become more complex over time. (Illustration: A bag with balls to explain probability).
certain: 1. having no doubt. 2. being a proven fact. We are sometimes sure of things that aren't facts.
probable: more likely than not. If most balls in a bag are black, you'll probably pick a black one.
